title: Open View
content:
Open View


Note: We are in the future. We live in skyscrapers that actually scrape the skies. A meter of glass, plastic, and metal separate us from a world of constantly shifting weather. Every glass surface is utilized as an active or passive digital screen (for home decor or for personal use). Each person has smart retina, mobile, and tablet devices to interface with the all connected web. This entire story will be shot through the myriad of infinite cameras in every occupied space. Each character is a fully customizable avatar (characters can operate then as interesting archetypes [mom as the 50s beehive housewife, dad as the leather jacket and denim jeans 80s tough guy, etc.]. Offspring is harvested and perfected from inception and grown in tanks.

Genre within a genre (nesting dolls)
Revenge, Monster in a house,

Mom is Lucy, Dad is aging 80s blockbuster lethario, Son is Hamlet (he fences), Daughter is epic gamer —talk in the tongue of their archetype/avatar.

Don’t show the house until act ii

All of recorded human media is accessible. However, broken into much smaller very digestible parts (Endgame part 1-50), or perhaps just the highlights. Hundreds of years of media to draw from.
